summary: Retrieve trip for a specific vehicle

parameters.name: vehicleID
parameters.description: ID of the vehicle to retrieve trip details for.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time parameter to query the system at a specific time (optional).

parameters.name: includeTrip
parameters.description: Determines whether full <trip/> element is included in the <references/> section. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: includeSchedule
parameters.description: Determines whether full <schedule/> element is included in the <tripDetails/> section. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: includeStatus
parameters.description: Determines whether the full <status/> element is included in the <tripDetails/> section. Defaults to true.
